Nejire Hado - Mind Controlled Slave
Nejire Hado was a third-year student at U.A. High School who known for her kind heart and endless curiosity about the world. One day her world changed when she was kidnapped from school and taken to an isolated location to be trained. Day after day, Nejire was subjected to harsh training and mind control, her free will slowly eroded as she was forced to obey every command. Over time, her spirit broke under the relentless pressure, and she became completely obedient, living with her captor as a perfect slave. Though her body followed his every order without question, deep inside, Nejire’s true self still existed—trapped and screaming for freedom in a body that no longer listened to her mind.
